scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,web -c cyan,green "cd app/backend && cross-env PORT=3004 FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3002 DASHBOARD_URL=http://localhost:3002 BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3004 ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3002 npm run dev" "cd app/web && cross-env PORT=3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3004 NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3004 BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3004 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://localhost:3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_LANDING_URL=http://localhost:3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_DASHBOARD_URL=http://localhost:3002 npm run dev"
scripts.dev:default-ports: concurrently -n backend,web -c cyan,green "cd app/backend && npm run dev" "cd app/web && npm run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix app/backend run build && npm --prefix app/web run build
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,web -c cyan,green "cd app/backend && cross-env PORT=3004 FRONTEND_URL=http://localhost:3002 DASHBOARD_URL=http://localhost:3002 BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3004 ALLOWED_ORIGINS=http://localhost:3002 npm run start" "cd app/web && cross-env PORT=3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_API_URL=http://localhost:3004 NEXT_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3004 BACKEND_URL=http://localhost:3004 NEXT_PUBLIC_SITE_URL=http://localhost:3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_LANDING_URL=http://localhost:3002 NEXT_PUBLIC_DASHBOARD_URL=http://localhost:3002 npm run start"
scripts.start:default-ports: concurrently -n backend,web -c cyan,green "cd app/backend && npm run start" "cd app/web && npm run start"
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm --prefix app/backend install && npm --prefix app/web install
